title: Add OSCORE encrypt/decrypt test vectors
description:
The OSCORE implementation in Rust (lichen-oscore) and Python (crypto/oscore.py) have only embedded unit tests. Need shared JSON test vectors in test/vectors/oscore.json for:
- Key derivation from master secret (RFC 8613 Section 3.2)
- Request protection/unprotection round-trip
- Response protection/unprotection (with/without PIV echo)
- Replay window behavior
- Known test vectors from RFC 8613 Appendix C

This enables parity testing between Rust, Python, and future Zephyr implementations.
close_reason: Implemented: Added test/vectors/oscore.json with 19 test vectors from RFC 8613 Appendix C covering key derivation (6 vectors), request/response protection (4 vectors), roundtrip (2 vectors), replay window (5 vectors), and invalid inputs (2 vectors). Created Python test (15 tests) and Rust test (6 tests) that validate implementations against these vectors.
